query:
-- Add BatchDialer fields to calls table
ALTER TABLE calls
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS callSource ENUM('ghl', 'batchdialer') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ghl' AFTER tenantId,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS batchDialerCallId INT AFTER ghlLocationId,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS batchDialerCampaignId INT AFTER batchDialerCallId,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS batchDialerCampaignName VARCHAR(255) AFTER batchDialerCampaignId,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS batchDialerAgentName VARCHAR(255) AFTER batchDialerCampaignName;

-- Add unique index for batchDialerCallId
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_batchDialerCallId ON calls(batchDialerCallId);

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS batchDialerCampaignId INT AFTER batchDialerCallId,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS batchDialerCampaignName VARCHAR(255) AFTER batchDialerCampaignId,

-- Add unique index for batchDialerCallId
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_batchDialerCallId ON calls(batchDialerCallId);
